title: BIS US Dollar / Bilateral Exchange Rates — full bulk dataset (CSV, flat)
countries: ALL (world, BIS-reporting economies; IRN not a BIS reporter — KOR/TUR/USA/DEU/FRA/GBR/ITA/NLD/ESP/PRT/GRC included)
time_coverage: long historical daily run through most recent date (series start dates vary by country)
license_terms: BIS Terms of Use — free for non-commercial use with attribution
notes: BIS dataset WS_XRU ('Bilateral exchange rates', reported vs USD). Full-topic bulk zip, world coverage, flat CSV format. Uncompressed CSV ~447MB; zip itself 10.3MB, well under 500MB limit.
